resolution: Fixed - Added secure_path_join() and validate_filename() functions, updated all path handling endpoints to prevent directory traversal
title: Potential Path Traversal Vulnerability
description: The ingestion command allows user-defined paths without validation, which could lead to path traversal attacks.

root_cause_potential: Lack of input validation on user-provided paths
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Validate and sanitize input paths to ensure they do not escape the intended directory structure

immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent unauthorized access to file system locations
Ensure paths remain within intended directory structure
Standardize secure path operations across the application

impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - Security risk in file handling operations
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Should be resolved to prevent security exploits
